name: @kmos/conformance
description: KMOS Conformance Kit — defines and verifies what it means to be KMOS-compliant. Framework-agnostic contract suites for every replaceable port (EventLog, Authorizer, CapabilityHandler) plus canonical-object/event conformance, with a programmatic runner and CLI. Depends only on the canonical kernel so any implementation/adapter/SDK/third party can self-certify.
